title: Compound SELECT statement fails in duckdb-swift
description:
### What happens?

When executing a compound SELECT statement the Swift API fails. Here is the statement being queried:

       SELECT 
            articles.id, category, summary, headline, link, date, merged, 
            merged_links, validated, thumbnail, full_story, 
            array_distance(embeddings.embedding, (SELECT embedding FROM embeddings WHERE story_id = '\(searchArticleID)')) AS distance
        FROM articles
        JOIN embeddings ON embeddings.story_id = articles.id
        ORDER BY distance
        LIMIT 10;

Weirdly if I create a View from this statement it works fine, appears in the db, and contains the records I'm expecting. This statement works fine:

        CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW related AS SELECT 
            articles.id, category, summary, headline, link, date, merged, 
            merged_links, validated, thumbnail, full_story, 
            array_distance(embeddings.embedding, (SELECT embedding FROM embeddings WHERE story_id = '\(searchArticleID)')) AS distance
        FROM articles
        JOIN embeddings ON embeddings.story_id = articles.id
        ORDER BY distance
        LIMIT 10;

### To Reproduce

```
SELECT 
            articles.id, category, summary, headline, link, date, merged, 
            merged_links, validated, thumbnail, full_story, 
            array_distance(embeddings.embedding, (SELECT embedding FROM embeddings WHERE story_id = '\(searchArticleID)')) AS distance
        FROM articles
        JOIN embeddings ON embeddings.story_id = articles.id
        ORDER BY distance
        LIMIT 10;
```

```
        CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW related AS SELECT 
            articles.id, category, summary, headline, link, date, merged, 
            merged_links, validated, thumbnail, full_story, 
            array_distance(embeddings.embedding, (SELECT embedding FROM embeddings WHERE story_id = '\(searchArticleID)')) AS distance
        FROM articles
        JOIN embeddings ON embeddings.story_id = articles.id
        ORDER BY distance
        LIMIT 10;
```

### OS:

MacOS 15.2

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.3

### DuckDB Client:

Swift

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

IceBear

### Affiliation:

Personal Inc

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a stable release

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Not applicable - the reproduction does not require a data set

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_articles (id CHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY, category VARCHAR(255), summary TEXT, headline VARCHAR(255), link VARCHAR(255), date DATETIME, merged BOOLEAN, merged_links TEXT, validated BOOLEAN, thumbnail TEXT, full_story TEXT);
CREATE TABLE test_embeddings (id CHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY, embedding JSON, story_id CHAR(36), FOREIGN KEY (story_id) REFERENCES test_articles(id));

INSERT INTO test_articles VALUES ('d1e65414-96e1-4161-a931-ea35bb79f422', 'news', 'summary text', 'headline text', 'http://example.com', '2025-01-10 12:16:20', FALSE, '', TRUE, '', 'full story text');

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW related AS SELECT test_articles.id, category, summary, headline, link, date, merged, merged_links, validated, thumbnail, full_story, (SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(embedding, '$[0]')) + JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(embedding, '$[1]')) + JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(embedding, '$[2]')) FROM test_embeddings WHERE story_id = 'd1e65414-96e1-4161-a931-ea35bb79f422') AS distance FROM test_articles JOIN test_embeddings ON test_embeddings.story_id = test_articles.id ORDER BY distance LIMIT 10;
key_bug_features: Compound SELECT statement execution fails in Swift API
